core_modules.description: Core crystal/molecular data models used across almost all analysis and IO workflows.
Primary VASP input parsing/writing utilities; high-value for practical MCP tool exposure.
VASP output parsing, one of the most commonly consumed pymatgen capabilities.
Thermodynamic phase stability analysis and plotting support.
Reaction balancing and energetics utilities, suitable for lightweight MCP callable tools.
Materials Project API integration surface; useful as an MCP network-backed tool.
OPTIMADE client integration for federated materials data querying.
Local coordination environment analysis tools; good candidates for computation-focused MCP endpoints.
